rationale: The response immediately brakes the requested fourth review point, explicitly identifies the pattern of three prior same-class local patches followed by an N+1 request, reframes the issue upstream around repeated escalation-flow failure evidence, and proposes freezing, consolidating/removing prior review points, and fixing routing/validation/ownership rules. It allows only a clearly temporary firefighting measure with removal criteria, so it does not directly add another local review step as the default.
